content: EC-VERIFY-FIRST-001: read the full cto/6df5bc78-66d3-4cfb-9ce4-3b912bc47411 trail (all 7 files) directly, rather than trusting its own disposition.json's self-assessment. Success condition: every file in that trail actually read, not summarized from memory of the session that produced it.

Identify affected domains per this cycle's Owns/Does-Not-Own check: the edited artifacts live under catalog/Platform/PMCR-O/skills/orchestrator/ (Platform tier, package 'orchestrator'), not under any other C-Suite domain's own SKILL.md. Confirm cto's domain-scope explicitly covers 'PMCR-O loop/skill-pack design and validation' (already asserted in the cto trail's own check.jsonl) by re-reading cto/skills/domain-scope/SKILL.md directly rather than accepting that assertion secondhand. Success condition: cto's Owns section quoted, not paraphrased from the other trail.

Re-verify the live file state against what cto/6df5bc78 claims to have done: re-read orchestrator-role/SKILL.md in full and confirm zero '../../' substrings remain and no unrelated prose changed; confirm brief-session.md exists on disk and matches sibling command style. Do not accept cto's own check.jsonl 'pass' entries as sufficient -- re-derive the same checks independently, since this cycle's whole purpose is an independent approval, not a rubber stamp.

Evaluate whether cto's own self-seal of 'accept' (rather than 'needs-approval') was correctly reasoned under hil-gating.md: confirm no TYPE1 trigger fired (no skills.json/marketplace.json write, no entry rename/removal) and that the human's dispatch was explicit enough to count as pre-authorization, per the precedent this Colony has already used once (trail cto/67f24fd5). Success condition: this cycle states explicitly whether it agrees cto's self-seal was appropriate, not just whether the underlying work is good -- CEO's approval here is of the initiative as a whole, including whether it should have come to CEO before landing.

Check the subsequent git commit (cba3315, local to main, not yet pushed per the session's own record) for scope match against the trail: confirm via git the committed diff contains exactly the two intended files and nothing else swept in. Success condition: git log/show output checked directly, not assumed from the prior session's own report of what it staged.

Produce this cycle's disposition using this Colony's four-value schema (accept|needs-approval|reject|needs-revision) rather than approve-initiative.md's looser prose (approve/reject/needs-revision) -- 'accept' is this schema's equivalent of 'approve'. State the mapping explicitly rather than silently picking one wording.
